key_learnings: Enterprise features (SSO, export) drove 3 new enterprise logo wins
Mobile app stickier than expected — 45% of beta users active daily

proposed_themes_q3.rationale: Enterprise deals blocked on security checklist
Mobile stickiness signal — invest to capture retention advantage
Mid-market deals asking for these integrations

constraints.budget_restriction: No new infrastructure spend without VP approval
hard_deadlines: SOC 2 audit: 2026-09-01 (RBAC and audit log must be done first)

strategic_context: We are executing a mid-market expansion. Enterprise is strategic but secondary. CompetitorX just raised Series C and is moving upmarket — we have 6-12 months before they compete directly in our core segment.
